raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1418 aims to streamline the permitting process for hydrogen fueling stations in California.",
    "California currently has a streamlined permitting process for battery electric charging stations.",
    "SB 1418 mandates that cities and counties must adopt an ordinance and checklist for expedited permitting of hydrogen-fueling stations.",
    "California is the largest contributor of greenhouse gas and criteria pollutant emissions in the state.",
    "The transition from internal combustion engines to zero-emission drivetrains is necessary to improve environmental and human health in California.",
    "California has been awarded up to $1.2 billion from the US Department of Energy to accelerate the development and deployment of clean renewable hydrogen.",
    "The federal funds secured by the Alliance for Renewable Clean Hydrogen Energy Systems (ARCHES) are intended to build or expand hydrogen projects.",
    "Success in achieving California's zero-emission goals requires scaling up hydrogen-fueling infrastructure and vehicle development."
  ]
}
```
